# CMake / CLion build folders
cmake-build-debug/
cmake-build-release/
cmake-build-*/

# CLion / IntelliJ project files
.idea/
*.iml

# CMake generated files
CMakeCache.txt
CMakeFiles/
cmake_install.cmake
Makefile
compile_commands.json

# Executables / binaries
*.exe
*.out
*.dll
*.so
*.dylib

# Optional: generated crash dumps / logs
*.log
